mainSite.name: PivotMarkets.ai
mainSite.description: Industrial-grade AI agent infrastructure provider offering proprietary, grounded AI chassis for vertical business applications. RAG-first architecture with SOC2/HIPAA compliance.

founder.name: PivotMarkets Founder
founder.description: 20 years of General Contracting and SDIRA/ROBS experience

offers.name: Operations Chassis
offers.description: Managed workflows for maintenance and healthcare administration. Powers AssetGuard Pro and ClinicFlow applications.

offers.name: Valuation Chassis
offers.description: High-speed appraisal and risk detection for resale and finance sectors. Powers the Trove application.

offers.name: Verification Chassis
offers.description: Geofencing and OCR for digital-to-physical logistics verification. Powers Inventory Control application.

offers.name: Communication Chassis
offers.description: HIPAA-compliant voice and SMS triage for healthcare and service industries.

offers.name: Venture Auditor
offers.description: Technical due diligence and RAG-first audit to validate AI application architecture and funding readiness.

offers.name: Funding Concierge
offers.description: Expert guidance on SDIRA/ROBS structures and Regulation Crowdfunding for AI ventures.

appStore.name: AssetGuard Pro
appStore.description: AI-powered maintenance workflow management for property owners and facility managers with predictive maintenance scheduling and asset lifecycle tracking.
featureList: Automated work order generation based on asset condition
Predictive failure detection using manufacturer data
Vendor coordination with automated bid requests
Real-time asset health dashboards with cost-of-failure forecasting

review.reviewBody: 18-month deployment across 127 multifamily properties (2,400+ units) showed 40% reduction in emergency repairs and $18K average annual savings per 50-unit property.

appStore.name: Trove
appStore.description: High-speed AI appraisal engine for resale and finance sectors with instant valuations, risk detection, and market trend analysis.
featureList: Real-time market data integration from 40+ auction platforms
Computer vision authentication for luxury goods
Automated comparable sales analysis with confidence intervals

review.reviewBody: Validation study comparing Trove valuations to actual auction results across 12,000 luxury watches and handbags showed 94% accuracy within ±10% of realized sale price with 2.3s average appraisal time.

appStore.name: Inventory Control
appStore.description: Geofencing and OCR-powered verification for digital-to-physical logistics with real-time inventory accuracy and location validation.
featureList: GPS geofencing with automated check-in/check-out verification
OCR scanning of serial numbers, part codes, and shipping labels
Real-time discrepancy alerts with photo documentation
Integration with ERP systems for automated reconciliation

review.reviewBody: 9-month deployment at automotive parts distributor with 14 warehouse locations showed 90% reduction in part number errors, 99.4% inventory accuracy rate, and 4.2 hours saved per employee per week.
